inputs.label: Semi-major axis
inputs.businessContext: Average distance from the primary body, e.g., 1 AU = 149,597,870,691 m.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average distance from the primary body, e.g., 1 AU = 149,597,870,691 m.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birincil cisimden ortalama uzaklık, örn. 1 AU = 149.597.870.691 m.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Entfernung vom Primärkörper, z.B. 1 AE = 149.597.870.691 m.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance moyenne du corps principal, ex. 1 UA = 149 597 870 691 m.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia media al cuerpo primario, ej. 1 UA = 149.597.870.691 m.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط المسافة من الجسم الأساسي، على سبيل المثال 1 وحدة فلكية = 149,597,870,691 متر.

inputs.label: Mass of primary body
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the central body, e.g., Sun mass = 1.989 × 10^30 kg.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the central body, e.g., Sun mass = 1.989 × 10^30 kg.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Merkezi cismin kütlesi, örn. Güneş kütlesi = 1,989 × 10^30 kg.
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse des Zentralkörpers, z.B. Sonnenmasse = 1,989 × 10^30 kg.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse du corps central, ex. masse du Soleil = 1,989 × 10^30 kg.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa del cuerpo central, ej. masa del Sol = 1,989 × 10^30 kg.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كتلة الجسم المركزي، على سبيل المثال كتلة الشمس = 1.989 × 10^30 كجم.

inputs.label: Mass of secondary body
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the orbiting body, e.g., Earth mass = 5.972 × 10^24 kg.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the orbiting body, e.g., Earth mass = 5.972 × 10^24 kg.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yörüngedeki cismin kütlesi, örn. Dünya kütlesi = 5,972 × 10^24 kg.
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse des umlaufenden Körpers, z.B. Erdmasse = 5,972 × 10^24 kg.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse du corps en orbite, ex. masse de la Terre = 5,972 × 10^24 kg.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa del cuerpo en órbita, ej. masa de la Tierra = 5,972 × 10^24 kg.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كتلة الجسم المداري، على سبيل المثال كتلة الأرض = 5.972 × 10^24 كجم.

inputs.label: Gravitational constant
inputs.businessContext: Universal gravitational constant, standard value 6.67430 × 10^{-11} m^3 kg^{-1} s^{-2}.

businessContext_i18n.en: Universal gravitational constant, standard value 6.67430 × 10^{-11} m^3 kg^{-1} s^{-2}.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Evrensel çekim sabiti, standart değer 6,67430 × 10^{-11} m^3 kg^{-1} s^{-2}.
businessContext_i18n.de: Universelle Gravitationskonstante, Standardwert 6,67430 × 10^{-11} m^3 kg^{-1} s^{-2}.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Constante gravitationnelle universelle, valeur standard 6,67430 × 10^{-11} m^3 kg^{-1} s^{-2}.
businessContext_i18n.es: Constante gravitacional universal, valor estándar 6,67430 × 10^{-11} m^3 kg^{-1} s^{-2}.
businessContext_i18n.ar: ثابت الجاذبية العام، القيمة القياسية 6.67430 × 10^{-11} م^3 كجم^{-1} ث^{-2}.
